name: Ansh Madaan
education: B.Tech, Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology, 2023-Present

projects.name: EEG-based Schizophrenia Detection using Deep Learning
projects.description: Developed a hybrid CNN–LSTM with an attention model achieving 97% accuracy for schizophrenia detection from EEG data, using bandpass filtering and temporal windowing for robust feature extraction. Improved model interpretability through Grad-CAM, Integrated Gradients, and attention weight visualization.

projects.name: Face Recognition-Based Chatbot Authentication System
projects.description: Built a secure chatbot access system using real-time face recognition with OpenCV, integrating facial authentication with conversational AI for personalized interaction. The system ensures high-accuracy face matching with efficient encoding and secure data handling.

projects.name: Voice Assisted Terminal
projects.description: Engineered a voice-controlled terminal that enables execution of complex shell operations via natural language by integrating Google’s generative AI models for intelligent command understanding. This project was published as a PyPI package to improve developer productivity.
